min_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age of Proposer should be eighteen (18) years and above.

max_entry_age.source_quote: iii. No upper limit on entry age of any eligible family member.

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Dependent children (natural or legally adopted) between the entry age of three (03) months and twenty five (25) years

sum_insured_options.source_quote: The Policy is available with options of SI of ₹ 50,000 to ₹ 10L, in multiple of ₹ 50,000.

grace_period.source_quote: The Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days.

free_look_period.source_quote: The insured person shall be allowed free look period of thirty (30) days from date of receipt of the policy document to review the

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 (thirty six) months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 (twenty four) months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The Company shall indemnify pre-hospitalization medical expenses incurred, related to an admissible hospitalization requiring Inpatient Care, for a fixed period of 30 days prior to the date of admissible Hospitalization covered under the Policy.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: for a fixed period of 60 days from the date of discharge from the hospital, following an admissible hospitalization covered under the Policy.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (National Parivar Mediclaim covers 140+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: Copayment of 5% on all claims for Insured Person aged less than equal to 75 years on policy inception date

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent, Boarding, Nursing Expenses all inclusive as provided by the Hospital / Nursing Home up to 2% of the sum insured subject to maximum of Rs. 5,000/-per day

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: The Policy can only be issued for a period of one (01) year (i.e., 12 calendar months).

ayush_coverage.source_quote: Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy system of medicines shall be covered upto sum insured, during each policy year as specified in the policy schedule

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: The Policy provides for Cashless Facility and/ or reimbursement of Hospitalisation expenses for treatment of Illness or Injury.

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: Increase in the sum insured by 5% of SI in respect of each claim free year of insurance maximum up to 50% of current SI.

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: will issue pre-authorization letter within an hour to the hospital after verification.

geographic_coverage.source_quote: Treatment taken outside the geographical limits of India

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: Arogya Sanjeevani Policy - National is an individual indemnity health insurance product.

copayment_pct.source_quote: Copayment of 5% on all claims for Insured Person aged less than equal to 75 years on policy inception date

room_rent_capping.value: Up to 2% of SI per day, max INR 5,000/day. Proportionate clause applies.
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent, Boarding, Nursing Expenses all inclusive as provided by the Hospital / Nursing Home up to 2% of the sum insured subject to maximum of Rs. 5,000/-per day

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus will be increased by 5% in respect of each claim free Policy Period (where no claims are reported and admitted)
